title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. pseudalbinum
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. pseudalbinum, also known as a subspecies of Hieracium jurassicum, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are thought to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium jurassicum subsp. pseudalbinum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized in a convenient and accessible way.
